name: TERAWULF INC.
summary: TeraWulf Inc. is a vertically integrated owner, developer, and operator of large-scale digital infrastructure in the United States, purpose-built for high-performance computing (HPC) workloads including AI, machine learning, and advanced cloud applications. The company operates two primary HPC campuses—Lake Mariner in Barker, New York and Abernathy in Texas—with 522 MW of contracted critical IT load, while also operating legacy bitcoin mining facilities. Long-term data center leases with credit-enhanced counterparties are its primary revenue model.
